creator: dean@fragfest.com.au
text:
This bug was reported in detail at https://github.com/ipmitool/ipmitool/issues/388 you can see that it impacts Dell, UCS and HPE servers at a minimum. There is a fix proposed on that github issue since 2023.

However github is now where this project code lives so i suspect it has been ignored.

I have juggled the patch over to codeberg and send a pull request here https://codeberg.org/IPMITool/ipmitool/pulls/50

This bug is affecting our servers so we are hoping that this fix can be applied to the freebsd port and we can unfreeze our packages. Hopefully it will eventually be merged upstream or fixed in a better way.
